summary: Replayed ADR 0282 from the refreshed mainline release 0.177.93 using committed source 9f241acdf0ec64f97b42c5494c5b8d2e2f36e6e1, carried Mailpit as the private development SMTP interceptor onto the current 0.130.62 live baseline, and re-verified the guest-local Mailpit API plus a fresh cross-host SMTP capture from monitoring-lv3 before cutting release 0.177.94 with no platform-version bump.

verification.check: Focused Mailpit pytest and syntax slice
verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest python -m pytest -q tests/test_mailpit_runtime_role.py tests/test_mailpit_playbook.py tests/test_mail_platform_verify_playbook.py tests/test_keycloak_runtime_role.py` passed with `22 passed`, `make syntax-check-mailpit` passed, and `ansible-playbook -i inventory/hosts.yml playbooks/mail-platform-verify.yml --private-key .local/ssh/hetzner_llm_agents_ed25519 -e proxmox_guest_ssh_connection_mode=proxmox_host_jump -e env=staging --syntax-check` passed on the refreshed 0.177.93 baseline.

`ALLOW_IN_PLACE_MUTATION=true make live-apply-service service=mailpit env=production` succeeded from committed source `9f241acdf0ec64f97b42c5494c5b8d2e2f36e6e1` with recap `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=115 changed=4 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=18 rescued=0 ignored=0`, captured in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0282-mainline-live-apply.txt`.
A fresh ad-hoc probe on `docker-runtime-lv3` returned `{"Version":"v1.29.5"..."Messages":1..."SMTPAccepted":7}`, confirming the Mailpit API remained healthy after the exact-main replay.

A fresh probe from `monitoring-lv3` deleted old Mailpit messages, sent SMTP to `10.10.10.20:1025`, and confirmed exactly one matching message with subject `LV3 Mailpit exact-main verification` through `http://10.10.10.20:8025/api/v1/messages`.

verification.check: Release automation dry run and release cut
verification.observed: `LV3_SKIP_OUTLINE_SYNC=1 uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/release_manager.py --bump patch ... --dry-run` planned release `0.177.94`, and the corresponding write run prepared release `0.177.94` while preserving `platform_version: 0.130.62`.

`make validate` passed on the final release tree after refreshing the generated SLO assets, dependency graph page, and architecture diagrams, adding `gotenberg_runtime` to the role-idempotency registry, migrating `scripts/docker_publication_assurance.py` onto `platform.retry.with_retry`, and recording the two existing large-role ansible-lint complexity findings in `.ansible-lint-ignore`.

`make remote-validate` passed with `agent-standards`, `alert-rule-validation`, `ansible-syntax`, `dependency-graph`, `policy-validation`, `schema-validation`, `type-check`, and `workstream-surfaces` all reported as `passed`.

`make pre-push-gate` passed with `agent-standards`, `alert-rule-validation`, `ansible-lint`, `ansible-syntax`, `artifact-secret-scan`, `dependency-direction`, `dependency-graph`, `documentation-index`, `generated-docs`, `generated-portals`, `integration-tests`, `packer-validate`, `policy-validation`, `schema-validation`, `security-scan`, `service-completeness`, `tofu-validate`, `type-check`, `workstream-surfaces`, and `yaml-lint` all reported as `passed`.

`make check-build-server` returned `build-server-ok`, resolved the session workspace under `/home/ops/builds/proxmox_florin_server/.lv3-session-workspaces/ws-0282-main-merge-d9eefd1215/repo`, and completed the immutable snapshot dry-run upload for `codex/ws-0282-main-merge@9f241acdf0ec64f97b42c5494c5b8d2e2f36e6e1`.

notes: This receipt is the canonical exact-main proof for ADR 0282 on top of repository baseline 0.177.93 and live platform baseline 0.130.62.
No platform-version bump is recorded here because Mailpit first became true on platform version 0.130.60; release 0.177.94 only integrates that already-live capability onto current main.
The earlier branch-local receipt remains part of the audit trail, but the canonical Mailpit receipt for integrated main now points at this exact-main replay.
